title: MD and Horizontal Distance
content:
On the well 0a57a29c the maximum MD is 17905 ft (path length).

When we look at the .png image we see the maximum Horizontal Distance Along Azimuth (HDAA) around 6900 m (approx 22600 ft).

How can a projection (22.6k ft) be larger than the current path (17.9k ft)?

How can I replicate the .png plot?
